# Original User Demand Review Template

## Purpose

- Use this review to compare the earliest imported user demand and in-process user feedback against the final solution.
- Do not use only the converged requirement list as evidence.
- This review exists to catch demand loss caused by divergence, regrouping, or abstraction.

## Review Scope

- review subject:
- review date:
- owner:
- final solution artifact:
- linked requirement baseline:

| Source Type | Path / Record | Time | Why It Matters |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| inbox / chat / note |  |  |  |
| inbox / chat / note |  |  |  |

## Loss Audit

- Which original user demands were fully preserved:
- Which were only partially preserved:
- Which were dropped:
- Which were reinterpreted into a different product mechanism:

## Final Judgment

- Does the final solution solve the user's earliest real problem:
- Does it solve the latest user-corrected problem:
- Do testing cases still point back to the user stories derived from the original demand:
- Is the result only self-consistent at the product-requirement layer:

## Conclusion

- status: `solved / partial / unsolved`
- next action:
